title: induction: engine_0/logfile_induction.txt does not tail with a 'Status: failed' entry when appropiate
body:
### Version

Yosys 0.29+21 (git sha1 147cceb51, clang 10.0.0-4ubuntu1 -fPIC -Os)

### On which OS did this happen?

Linux

### Reproduction Steps

Make an induction fail and then try the command:

```
$ grep "Status" simWorkspace/formal/FormalDeMuxTester/demux_sel_with_control/unnamed_prove/engine_0/logfile_induction.txt
##   0:00:01  Status: passed
$ grep "Status" simWorkspace/formal/FormalDeMuxTester/demux_sel_without_control/unnamed_prove/engine_0/logfile_induction.txt
$ echo $?
1
$ cat simWorkspace/formal/FormalDeMuxTester/demux_sel_without_control/unnamed_prove/engine_0/logfile_induction.txt
##   0:00:00  Solver: yices
##   0:00:00  Trying induction in step 20..
##   0:00:00  Trying induction in step 19..
##   0:00:00  Trying induction in step 18..
##   0:00:00  Trying induction in step 17..
##   0:00:00  Trying induction in step 16..
##   0:00:00  Trying induction in step 15..
##   0:00:00  Trying induction in step 14..
##   0:00:00  Trying induction in step 13..
##   0:00:00  Trying induction in step 12..
##   0:00:01  Trying induction in step 11..
##   0:00:01  Trying induction in step 10..
##   0:00:01  Trying induction in step 9..
##   0:00:01  Trying induction in step 8..
##   0:00:01  Trying induction in step 7..
##   0:00:01  Trying induction in step 6..
##   0:00:01  Trying induction in step 5..
##   0:00:01  Trying induction in step 4..
##   0:00:01  Trying induction in step 3..
##   0:00:01  Trying induction in step 2..
##   0:00:01  Trying induction in step 1..
##   0:00:01  Trying induction in step 0..
##   0:00:01  Temporal induction failed!
##   0:00:01  Assert failed in unnamed: unnamed.sv:269.46-270.37 ($assert$unnamed.sv:269$212)
##   0:00:01  Writing trace to VCD file: engine_0/trace_induct.vcd
```

There is no last line, which is inconsistent with all other logfiles.

```
##  0:00:01  Status: failed
```


### Expected Behavior

Like all the other logs and when induction is successful there is a `Status:` entry.

When induction fails I am expecting consistent engine_0/logfile.txt output

```
##   0:00:01  Status: failed
```

### Actual Behavior

```
##   0:00:00  Solver: yices
##   0:00:00  Trying induction in step 20..
##   0:00:00  Trying induction in step 19..
##   0:00:00  Trying induction in step 18..
##   0:00:00  Trying induction in step 17..
##   0:00:00  Trying induction in step 16..
##   0:00:00  Trying induction in step 15..
##   0:00:00  Trying induction in step 14..
##   0:00:00  Trying induction in step 13..
##   0:00:00  Trying induction in step 12..
##   0:00:01  Trying induction in step 11..
##   0:00:01  Trying induction in step 10..
##   0:00:01  Trying induction in step 9..
##   0:00:01  Trying induction in step 8..
##   0:00:01  Trying induction in step 7..
##   0:00:01  Trying induction in step 6..
##   0:00:01  Trying induction in step 5..
##   0:00:01  Trying induction in step 4..
##   0:00:01  Trying induction in step 3..
##   0:00:01  Trying induction in step 2..
##   0:00:01  Trying induction in step 1..
##   0:00:01  Trying induction in step 0..
##   0:00:01  Temporal induction failed!
##   0:00:01  Assert failed in unnamed: unnamed.sv:269.46-270.37 ($assert$unnamed.sv:269$212)
##   0:00:01  Writing trace to VCD file: engine_0/trace_induct.vcd
```
